---
name: Quarterly platform review
about: Re-verify Instagram rules against official sources and update the playbook
title: "Quarterly IG platform review — YYYY-MM"
labels: ["platform-review", "quarterly-check", "instagram"]
---

Work through the checklist in
`skills/the-hard-win/INSTAGRAM_PLAYBOOK.md` and update it (CURRENT RULES, Last verified /
next review dates, and a dated CHANGELOG row). Flag anything that breaks the posting setup.

## Checklist
- [ ] **Hashtag cap** — still 5? changed? still total regardless of placement?
- [ ] **Placement** — caption vs first comment: any new guidance?
- [ ] **Caption** — length limit, keyword/SEO indexing, first-line truncation.
- [ ] **Reach signals** — what Instagram/Mosseri currently say drives distribution.
- [ ] **Reels / image specs** — dimensions, length, cover rules.
- [ ] **Links & mentions** — links in bio/caption/comments, @mention limits, CTAs.
- [ ] **Original-content rules** — originality definition, recommendation-eligibility penalties.
- [ ] **Anything affecting `post-daily.js`, the renderer, or our caption/tag format.**

## Sources (official first)
- https://creators.instagram.com/grow/algorithms-and-ranking
- https://creators.instagram.com/original-content-guidelines
- https://creators.instagram.com/blog
- @mosseri / @creators / Instagram Help Center

## Outcome (pick one)
- [ ] No change needed
- [ ] Playbook updated
- [ ] Posting workflow needs update
- [ ] Hashtag / content templates need update
